message:
fix(lint): replace assert!(false, ...) with panic!() in test code

Idiomatic Rust lint cleanup: assert!(false, "msg") is a confusing
pattern that Clippy flags as misleading. Replace with direct panic!()
calls which clearly express unconditional failure intent.

- key_role_separation.rs: 2 replacements
- artifact_contract.rs: 3 replacements
- revocation_freshness_gate.rs: 1 replacement

No behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
